job_description:
Job Title: Entry level AI Engineer

Responsibilities:
- Build and set up machine learning models for Natural Language Processing (NLP).
- Work with AI models like BERT and GPT to handle different tasks.
- Optimize models to ensure they respond quickly and efficiently.
- Collaborate with the team to integrate AI into real applications.

Requirements:
- Comfortable writing code in Python.
- Familiarity with AI tools like PyTorch or Hugging Face.
- Basic understanding of how computers process text (Arabic AI/AraBERT is a plus).
- Ability to write clean and organized code.

candidate_cv.career_overview: Detail-oriented professional with extensive Information Technology experience in hardware and software troubleshooting/management. With additional experience in networking, task automation, server technologies, digital graphic design, client + server side programming technologies and popular industry software packages including Microsoft Office and Adobe Creative Suite[cite: 3, 4].

responsibilities: In charge of planning, budgeting, and executing all IT projects[cite: 24].
In addition to office troubleshooting, building/managing the company website and designing/updating the business's electronic newsletter[cite: 25].
Contracted IT consulting work from client computer repair to network expansion[cite: 28].
In charge of company website management, social media administration, as well as assisting in administrative tasks[cite: 30].

accomplishments: Rebuilt a client's website from the ground up and increased monthly hits from 3422 to 40884 in a matter of a few months[cite: 11].
Designed, priced, built, and installed a complete information system upgrade for a client[cite: 12].
Automated and streamlined daily office tasks for client using Batch Scripting[cite: 16].
Programmed a cloud storage website allowing a client access to a shared home network drive from any browser[cite: 19].
